'''sayana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uytenbogaardtite|uytenbogaardtite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uytenbogaardtite|uytenbogaardtite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sayana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæyænæth|sæyænæth]] || [[word:sæyænæj|sæyænæj]] || [[word:sæyænæsh|sæyænæsh]] || [[word:sæyænæ|sæyænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sayayanath|sayayanath]] || [[word:sayayanaj|sayayanaj]] || [[word:sayayanash|sayayanash]] || [[word:sayayana|sayayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sayanath|sayanath]] || [[word:sayanaj|sayanaj]] || [[word:sayanash|sayanash]] || [[word:sayana|sayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sayafnath|sayafnath]] || [[word:sayafnaj|sayafnaj]] || [[word:sayafnash|sayafnash]] || [[word:sayafnaf|sayafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sayanatha|sayanatha]] || [[word:sayanaja|sayanaja]] || [[word:sayanasha|sayanasha]] || [[word:sayanaka|sayanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sayanath|sayanath]] || [[word:sayanaj|sayanaj]] || [[word:sayanash|sayanash]] || [[word:sayana|sayana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sayanathal|sayanathal]] || [[word:sayanajal|sayanajal]] || [[word:sayanashal|sayanashal]] || [[word:sayanakal|sayanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sayanathatha|sayanathatha]] || [[word:sayanajaja|sayanajaja]] || [[word:sayanashasha|sayanashasha]] || [[word:sayanaka|sayanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sayanathan|sayanathan]] || [[word:sayanajan|sayanajan]] || [[word:sayanashan|sayanashan]] || [[word:sayanakan|sayanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sayanathaoro|sayanathaoro]] || [[word:sayanajaoro|sayanajaoro]] || [[word:sayanashaoro|sayanashaoro]] || [[word:sayanakaoro|sayanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
